title: Item Card layout change is terrible
excerpt: About 3 days ago, a new update to monday changed how Item Cards are displayed. In our account, I remember we had something activated on Monday Labs, to keep the item card showing as a pop-up on the center of the screen. …

posts.author: MaxCoelho (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
About 3 days ago, a new update to monday changed how Item Cards are displayed. In our account, I remember we had something activated on Monday Labs, to keep the item card showing as a pop-up on the center of the screen. That pop-up had the item columns displayed on the left side, and the card updates displayed on the right side.

This made it very easy to change status and other informatations about the card, as well as comment on the card to let other members know other important things.

With the new update, the item card opens on a sliding window, on the right side of the screen, and you can no longer see both the item columns and card updates at the same time.

Screenshot 2025-04-07 1141511274×980 140 KB

Screenshot 2025-04-07 1141391273×653 75.1 KB

This wastes a lot of time, as we need to keep constantly changing views on the item card, as well as it makes it easyer for members to forget to updated important informations.

Please make an option in monday labs or at the settings, to change how item cards can be viewed.

Another option would be to add a widget on the item card, to shows the updates of the card. (image attached as reference below)

Screenshot 2025-04-07 1145102551×1264 300 KB

It seems that this change is to accomodate CRM funcionality at Work Management, but it should not impact it in such a bad way.

Is there any way to get the other layout sctructure back?

posts.author: cnantz (Chad Nantz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MaxCoelho,

My Team has also experienced the same changes you have. Have you used the Give Feedback feature on the Updates view to provide your feedback to Monday.com? That is one way to communicate with the folks at Monday.com.

Screenshot 2025-04-09 at 12.34.51 PM1008×202 16.6 KB

Alternatively, I have asked my Team to provide a list of items they need to see in a vertical format to customize one or more columns using the item card widget based on user needs.

Like you, this does not solve the issue of having updates and a vertical list together in the same view, but we are trying to make the new configuration work as best as possible.

Good Luck. Hopefully, a workaround will be offered soon.

posts.author: MaxCoelho (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have no idea what happened, but it has just reverted back to how it was.
I did not change anything at settings or monday labs.

Screenshot 2025-04-09 1036141266×989 97.6 KB

Here are the settings for monday labs, that we have on:

Screenshot 2025-04-09 103743633×400 25 KB

  • All the other settings are disabled. -

posts.author: MaxCoelho (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cnantz !
Thank you for pointing this out.
Will provide a feedback on the Updates View!

Hope we can see a change soon.

: )

posts.author: cnantz (Chad Nantz)
posts.cookedHtml:
@MaxCoelho

Excellent, same thing for us!

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
This indeed has turned back to the way it was, and we can see the ‘item pop-up card’ again, together with the updates.

One feature that would be interesting though would be the ability to hide some of the info that is shown in the ‘card’ view on the left. At the moment, all the item columns are shown, but for the ‘end-user’ (not aware of hidden/operational columns used for automations) the ability to hide them would be very interesting!

@CXS @CSG @BiancaT
